pageContext.name: Ben Ali Gator
pageContext.description: Super7's latest wave of Disney ULTIMATES! presented by Sideshow has a little something for everyone! With Ben AliGator from Disney's Fantasia, Stitch from Disney's Lilo & Stitch, Disney Silly Symphony's The Big Bad Wolf, and The Queen of Hearts from Disney's Alice in Wonderland, there's an ULTIMATES! figure for fans of vintage shorts, animated classics, and beloved modern movies! These 7' scale highly-articulated, made-to-order figures come with interchangeable parts and additional must-have accessories, making them the ultimate collectible for any Disney fan!  As Ben Ali Gator discovers, while wooing Hyacinth Hippo, even if things don't go as smoothly as a well-executed ballet, an earnest and enthusiastic effort with a certain panache can win the day. This 7 scale, highly articulated, intricately designed ULTIMATES! figure of Ben Ali Gator from Disney's Fantasia features a soft goods cape and includes multiple interchangeable heads & hands. Love can be found in the most unlikely of places, but we think it's highly likely you'll love to add this made-to-order Disney ULTIMATES! figure of Ben Ali Gator to your collection!
